canonical_definition: A benchmark consisting of four novel Tic-Tac-Toe-style games (oTTT, dTTT, cTTT, sTTT) designed to assess strategic, spatial, and logical reasoning through text-based board game questions asking for the best next move.
papers: MultiMatch: Multihead Consistency Regularization Matching for Semi-Supervised Text Classification

definitions.text: A benchmark consisting of four novel Tic-Tac-Toe-style games (oTTT, dTTT, cTTT, sTTT) designed to assess strategic, spatial, and logical reasoning through text-based board game questions asking for the best next move.

relationships.paper: MultiMatch: Multihead Consistency Regularization Matching for Semi-Supervised Text Classification
relationships.evidence: In this work, we introduce TTT-Bench, a new benchmark that is designed to evaluate basic strategic, spatial, and logical reasoning abilities in LRMs through a suite of four two-player Tic-Tac-Toe-style games that humans can effortlessly solve from a young age. (Abstract)
